textPlain:
This is such a cool project. Personally, I think there are so many interesting use cases that can be built on top of Wayland, like https://github.com/udevbe/greenfield
 and this

Wow your project is really impressive there were similar programs before but they didn't approach this so much. Your project really gives you the opportunity to do your work without the limitations that others had.
I wish you success in further development, don't stop!
